SNECKO-VENOM_POWER.title: Venom
SNECKO-VENOM_POWER.description: When a debuff beside [gold]Venom[/gold] is applied, lose [blue]X[/blue] HP.
SNECKO-VENOM_POWER.smartDescription: When a debuff beside [gold]Venom[/gold] is applied, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
SNECKO-SAVE_FOR_LATER_POWER.title: Save For Later
SNECKO-SAVE_FOR_LATER_POWER.description: At the end of yout turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] [blue]X[/blue] cards.
SNECKO-SAVE_FOR_LATER_POWER.smartDescrip: At the end of yout turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
SNECKO-BLUNDER_GUARD_POWER.title: Blunder Guard
SNECKO-BLUNDER_GUARD_POWER.description: Whenever you play a card that costs [blue]3[/blue] or more, gain [blue]X[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
SNECKO-BLUNDER_GUARD_TWO_POWER.title: Big Guns
SNECKO-BLUNDER_GUARD_TWO_POWER.descripti: Whenever you play a card that costs [blue]3[/blue] or more, gain [blue]X[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
SNECKO-BLUNDER_GUARD_TWO_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you play a card that costs [blue]3[/blue] or more, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
SNECKO-BLUNDER_GUARD_POWER.smartDescript: Whenever you play a card that costs [blue]3[/blue] or more, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
SNECKO-CHEAP_STOCK_POWER.title: Cheap Stock
SNECKO-CHEAP_STOCK_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Muddle[/gold] the highest cost card in your hand.
SNECKO-CHEAP_STOCK_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the start of your turn, [gold]Muddle[/gold] the{Amount:plural:| [blue]{Amount}[/blue]} highest cost {Amount:plural:card|cards} in your hand.
SNECKO-OVERWHELMING_POWER.title: Overwhelming
SNECKO-OVERWHELMING_POWER.description: The first time you play an [gold]Offclass[/gold] card each turn, draw a card.
SNECKO-OVERWHELMING_POWER.smartDescripti: The first time you play an [gold]Offclass[/gold] card each turn, draw {Amount:plural:a card|{Amount} cards}.
